function:
def c020(x):
    # replace the first element with the last element
    x[0] = x[-1]
    return x

def c054(x):
    # replace element 0 and 1 with element 2
    x[0] = x[2]
    x[1] = x[2]
    return x

def c053(x):
    # replace x[1] with x[0]
    x[1] = x[0]
    return x

def c143(x):
    # replace every occurrence of the largest element with the smallest element
    max_val = max(x)
    min_val = min(x)
    return [min_val if i == max_val else i for i in x]

def c229(x):
    # keep only first N elements of the reversed input, N is the first element
    length = x[0]
    return x[::-1][:length]

def c156(x):
    # reverse the input and add each element to its new index
    x = x[::-1]
    return [i+j for j, i in enumerate(x)]

def c172(x):
    # cumulative product
    res = []
    p = 1
    for i in x:
        p *= i
        res.append(p)
    return res

def c199(x):
    # elements in ascending order, each preceded by its rank
    res = []
    for i, v in enumerate(sorted(x)):
        res.append(i+1)
        res.append(v)
    return res

def c214(x):
    # remove elements 0 and N + 1, N is the first element
    x = x[1:x[0]+1] + x[x[0]+2:]
    return x

def c017(x):
    # replace x[1] with 8
    x[1] = 8
    return x

def c139(x):
    # remove all occurrences of the smallest element and the largest element
    min_val = min(x)
    max_val = max(x)
    return [i for i in x if i != min_val and i != max_val]

def c041(x):
    return [9]

def c115(x):
    # the unique elements, prepended and appended by their sum
    res = list(set(x))
    return [sum(res)] + res + [sum(res)]

def c211(x):
    # reverse input, insert fouth element and fifth element so they are fourth and third from the end respectively
    x = x[::-1]
    x.insert(-3, x[3])
    x.insert(-4, x[4])
    return x

def c086(x):
    # swap elements 0 and 3
    x[0], x[3] = x[3], x[0]
    return x

def c018(x):
    # replace element 1 with 9
    x[1] = 9
    return x

def c136(x):
    # remove the first occurrence of the largest element, keep the rest
    x.remove(max(x))
    return x

def c135(x):
    # remove the first 7
    x.remove(7)
    return x

def c033(x):
    # swap element 0 and 2
    x[0], x[2] = x[2], x[0]
    return x

def c144(x):
    # replace every occurrence of the largest or smallest element with their absolute difference
    max_val = max(x)
    min_val = min(x)
    return [abs(min_val - max_val) if i == min_val or i == max_val else i for i in x]

def c034(x):
    # swap element 1 and element 2
    x[0], x[1] = x[1], x[0]
    return x

def c042(x):
    return [5, 2]
